# Log Analytics tables for microsoft.avs/privateclouds

| Table | Categories | Solutions|[Supports basic log plan](/azure/azure-monitor/logs/basic-logs-configure?tabs=portal-1#compare-the-basic-and-analytics-log-data-plans)| Queries|
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [AVSEsxiFirewallSyslog](/azure/azure-monitor/reference/tables/AVSEsxiFirewallSyslog)<p>Contains firewall logs generated by ESXi hosts (distributed firewall and IDS/IPS where available). |  | LogManagement | Yes| -|
| [AVSEsxiSyslog](/azure/azure-monitor/reference/tables/AVSEsxiSyslog)<p>Contains logs generated by ESXi hosts, other than firewall and IDS/IPS entries. |  | LogManagement | Yes| -|
| [AVSNsxEdgeSyslog](/azure/azure-monitor/reference/tables/AVSNsxEdgeSyslog)<p>Contains logs generated by NSX Edges. |  | LogManagement | Yes| -|
| [AVSNsxManagerSyslog](/azure/azure-monitor/reference/tables/AVSNsxManagerSyslog)<p>Contains logs generated by NSX Managers. |  | LogManagement | Yes| -|
| [AVSSyslog](/azure/azure-monitor/reference/tables/AVSSyslog)<p>Contains all system logs generated by VMWare applications, including (but not limited to) VCenter, NSX, and more. |  | LogManagement | Yes| [Yes](/azure/azure-monitor/reference/queries/avssyslog)|
| [AVSVcSyslog](/azure/azure-monitor/reference/tables/AVSVcSyslog)<p>Contains all system logs generated by vCenter appliance. |  | LogManagement | Yes| -|
